name: Transit
overview:
One afternoon ahead of dusk in the month of Ramadan, Maryam, Aini, and Nico are required to take a decision on the problems facing them. In the same place, a station. Maryam must take off while facing her past. Aini who is faced with polemics with her father is required to learn to defeat the ego and start forgiving. While Nico, in the midst of his happiness ahead of his return meeting with his family in his hometown, must make a decision for something that is not only good for him but also for many people.

Like a journey through the transit period, Maryam, Aini, and Nico took advantage of their time to pause at the station to make big decisions in their lives.

trailers.title: [TRAILER] TRANSIT - A Web Series by 'Ramadhan Berbagi'
